title: Cua Rang Me

sections.heading: Nguyên liệu · Ingredients
items: 2 whole live crabs (about 2 lbs each), cleaned
½ cup tamarind paste (me chua), dissolved in 1 cup warm water and strained

sections.heading: Cách làm · Instructions
steps: Cut the crab into pieces. Crack the claws. Scoop out the roe (gạch cua) into a small bowl and set aside.
Heat oil in a wok with garlic and shallots.
Add the crab and stir-fry on high heat.
Add fish sauce, sugar, and MSG.
Stir the tamarind water until boiling, then pour about half a bowl over the crab. Reduce heat to low. If too sour, adjust.
Cover and cook for a few minutes. Add the reserved crab roe on top.

scan_label: Công thức gốc · Original handwritten recipe
